suspected_root_cause: UNKNOWN_BUT_LIKELY_NOT_DISCOVERY — DDGS returns hits under isolation. UMA is warn (not emergency). Pipeline with mocked discovery reaches fetch stage. Actual live run counters are 0 — possible cause: store=duckdb_store is None in the actual run, causing early returns or no-op storage. Another possibility: concurrent feed branch timeout cancels public branch before it completes.
recommended_next_patch: 1. Verify duckdb_store is not None when _run_public_discovery_in_cycle is called in canonical live run. 2. Add additive counters for discovery_attempted/discovery_error at pipeline top level (PipelineRunResult) so they appear in result even on early return. 3. Add logging at line 2008 (discovery_result = await ...) to capture discovery_result.error and discovery_result.hits count before processing. 4. Check if asyncio.TaskGroup public_task gets cancelled by feed branch timeout (line 1591-1613) before discovery completes.
key_findings: DDGS 9.14.1 works under isolation — 4 hits returned for 'ransomware infrastructure leak'
UMA state is warn (6.2GiB) — NOT emergency, won't abort before discovery
io_only=True but io_only does NOT gate discovery (only affects concurrency level)
_ASYNC_DISCOVERY_SEARCH seam exists and is properly patched at module load
Pipeline with mocked discovery REACHES fetch stage (test_06_pipeline_with_mocked_discovery_reaches_fetch PASS)
public_branch_verdict does NOT return backend_error when discovery succeeds
Circuit breaker is per-domain in fetcher, NOT blocking all discovery
SprintResult has NO counter for 'public_stored_findings' being 0 vs never-written
No logging at discovery stage entry to capture discovery_result in canonical run
notes: The 'backend_error_no_fallback' verdict appears when discovery_error is not None AND fallback_triggered is None.
The actual live run shows public_discovered=0 — likely means public_result.discovered==0.
If discovery returns hits but pipeline returns discovered=0, bug is AFTER discovery (injection, fetch, or storage).
Counter stage map shows all per-stage counters are MISSING from PipelineRunResult — only final counts exist.
F169E getattr(public_result, 'backend_degraded', False) reads top-level field, which IS set correctly.
